---
title: "Thermal video cameras for detection of platypus in smaller waterways"
description: "This is a slightly longer version of a talk delivered at the 2026 Triennial Platypus Conference at Taranga Zoo, Sydney, on 11 June 2026."
author:
  - name: Tim Churches
  - name: Alan Sheehan
  - name: Louisa Jorm
date: 2026-06-17
categories: [platypus, thermal cameras] # self-defined categories
citation: 
  url: https://oberon-citizen.science/posts/2026-06-17-thermal-cameras-to-detect-platypus/
image: deconstructing_viewsheds.png
draft: false 
freeze: true
cap-location: margin
lightbox: true
references:
- type: article-journal
  id: RobertsS2026
  author:
  - family: Roberts
    given: Simon
  - family: Serena
    given: Melody
  issued:
    date-parts:
    - - 2024
      - 46
      - 2
  title: 'Use of consolidated time-lapse imagery to detect and monitor platypus (Ornithorhynchus anatinus) activity.'
  title-short: Time-lapse imagery to detect platypus
  container-title: Australian Mammology
  volume: 46
  issue: 2
  DOI: 10.1071/AM23045
  URL: https://connectsci.au/am/article/46/2/AM23045/81288/Use-of-consolidated-time-lapse-camera-imagery-to
  language: en-AU
---

::: {.callout-note}
Oberon Citizen Science Network acknowledges the Traditional Owners of Country throughout Australia. The Oberon region is located on the territory of the Wiradjuri, Gundungurra and Dharug peoples who are the traditional custodians of the land on which we live, work and carry out our scientific enquiry. We pay our respects to Elders past and present and extend that respect to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples.
:::

::: {.aside}

![Tim Churches deivering this talk at the 2026 Platypus Conference at Taronga Zoo (click to zoom image)](../../assets/tim_churches_2026_platypus_conference_thermal.jpeg)
:::

This video is a slightly longer version of a talk delivered by Tim Churches on behalf of Oberon Citizen Science Network on Thursday, 11th June 2026 at the 2026 Triennial Platypus Conference held at Taronga Zoo, Sydney.

{{< video https://youtu.be/FePJwtK6mAI >}}
